name: Star Wars: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge

reviews.review_description: I just started playing this game yesterday and everything was working fine but then when I opened it up today, all of the menu screens were black and I can’t tell what anything is. I’ve tried all the usual fixes, but nothing‘s working. I’m playing on a quest 2. If this issue isn’t fixed soon, I’m gonna demand a refund￼￼￼￼￼

Please for the love of god fix the menu  it has been several days it’s making the game unplayable guys do not buy this game until they fix it big waste of money these devs are so lazy it’s been eeeks bad these disgusting devs don’t have the courage to fix there game every time I try teleport I can’t it only sends me to 2 locations this game is so bad I don’t even wanna give it one star it doesn’t deserve it do not buy this game until it’s fixed which will be never  because these devs are lazy I demand a refund on the dlc and the real game if it’s not fixed by tomorrow disgusting devs it didn’t take 2 weeks
 to fix it

as the title says there's a big glitch in this game where you basicly cant play. This does not surprise, Disney owns this game yet doesn't care about it. (also doesn't surprise me) Disney is not going to fix this game, the Deva are also not going to fix this game. Everyone review bomb this game. Then they might listen. I play on quest 3 and this glitch effects all platforms.

reviews.review_title: Great game until the menus blacked out
reviews.review_description: This game has great mechanics a nice immersive feel and fun story's until I loaded it one day to find the menus all blacked out, some faint writing but mostly black and not able to navigate anywhere. As previous review stated have all the usual, cleared data, hard re boot the headset ( quest 3 ) and uninstalled and re installed multiple times, still no joy, very disappointed as was enjoying the game and did not even get to start the DLC last call. I hope that a fix is in the Works as this is mostly a nice fun game.

You've broken the game after updating the metaquest. (Black interface/menu text) It's unplayable! After the latest update, the game's main menu interface, pause menu, and location change interface no longer display correctly. Please fix this because it's a disgrace!

Look I had a quest 2 and I was playing just fine, dlc came out and the update and screen blacked out then aftet a while I gave up after doing all the fixes that there was to do. So I bought a quest 3s and I'm having fun with all my other games but not this one. I mean really just leave it like that? How about an update to fix the blacked out menus ffs

I love this game and its DLC. However, there's currently a big bug that makes all UI menus black, rendering the game extremely hard to play. Others have also pointed this issue out, I'm just reiterating it in the hopes the issue is resolved soon.

Guys, I love this game. With the expansion, 4/5 stars all day. Recently something happened and you can’t read any menus cause they’re blacked out. Please patch to fix this issue. 
MTFBWY

May 27 2026 trying to fix settings menu no back lighting and dark can not make preference in settings I have deleted several times shut off cloud reinstalled about 3 times nothing fixed still same out come need help

reviews.review_title: Main menu screen buttons are blacked out
reviews.review_description: Upon booting the game the main menu options are all blacked out, still selectable but cannot be read at all. Devs need to fix this, if you haven't bought this game yet don't bother until the devs patch this issue. Be prepared to demand a refund if you still want to try getting it.
Someone else posted before me but I thought I would post as well in the hopes its fixed sooner. The menus are completely blacked out. Have no idea how to load my game, continue, or start a new game.

reviews.review_title: Great game, worth the price of admission
reviews.review_description:
I was lucky enough to get the DLC bundle for 50% off.   Well worth the money.   I've been blow away so far.  The game mechanics are very nice, hover, inventory, remotes.   This game is just alot of fun.  I was surprised how stunning the environments and visuals are.     This is a must have for any star wars fan.

Update,  looks like meta os 2.4 broke this game, black menus on launch screen.  Please fix.  Down to one star til fix.  I love this game so hope fixed soon.
Had the game a few weeks bought the add ons, played for a week now only have black screens at start up cant play game tried uninstalling and reinstalling with no luck. Very Disappointing

This game is a masterpiece of a game there’s not a single thing wrong with it graphics are beautiful on standalone the haptics are great movement is smooth everything feels natural throwing grenades among shooting ducking into cover opening your inventory eating healing it all feels great enemies feel fun to fight and it truly makes you feel like you’re on battu has a major Star Wars fan this makes me extremely happy also buy the dlc I recommend waiting till may 4th celebration sales and you can get the game and dlc for cheaper than just the game.￼

For a 30 dollar game, this was by far the most disappointing game I've ever bought. I completed it in about 2 hours. Not to mention the menu was all black. I can't even refund it due to be playing for 2 hours. This is beyond frustrating. The gameplay itself was fine, but the content was severely lacking. Though if there is more to the game I cannot find it due to the menu being all black. So my rant could be baseless
Loaded up the game just fine but the menu boxes are completely blacked out, I cant read the settings or the start menu or anything, and they won't give me a refund, I've tried everything

reviews.review_title: Can we appreciate how good this game is
reviews.review_description: Alr I get it the main story without the dlc is mid but if you buy the dlc the game gets much better, you can play a mission where your IG-88 or where you have to disguise as a stormtrooper to infiltrate a base to get your friend back, and there is a Jedi mission too.Also i love how you reload some of the weapons by opening the chamber the let the gas out.Anyways if your doubting buying this game don’t, if you love Star Wars then you will  most likely like the game, 1 last thing pls don’t forget you can teleport back to anywhere with your left controller menu button thing.

I started playing it 2 years ago and had no problems when I started playing it again the all the writing was gone it was blank I couldn't read it it's unplayable and I can't get no refund it was 20 quid and i want my refund
Was my absolute favorite game and now it's blacked out on the navi window same issue as other reviewer just a week earlier. Super bummed cause I bought the dlc add on pack.
Nearly been 3 weeks and the black menu screen issue still hasn’t been fixed .. I can’t play the game it’s very frustrating and annoying..
Fix the menu i was just clicking random bottons bcause i chould not see the menu it sucks i was Realy getting Into this game but the menu just is black the buttons work but the menu does not 😡

Everybting you see in the intro is false the gameplay is not what you see in intro. It has like 1hour story and it ends at stupidest time as possible. U have to buy every extra pack to have really fun in this game the story is ends way too soon u literally pay 30€ for demo gameplay stay away!

This is why Meta and Quest failed. Paying full price for mini games. I thought I was in a tutorial then suddenly the game is over. There's no light sabre or anything. Most of what is shown isn't actually in the game. It could have been good but it isn't. 
The controls on this game are terrible.
Don't push for any games on this thing. They're not even worth $10

Finished the main story (all missions), finished all tales (including the temple of darkness with Yoda) and can't start the DLC due to the broom not spawning. This is absolutely ridiculous. Only have a handful of previous saves I've loaded and still not working. Such a huge disappointment.

Hello at All after the Meta Update 2.4 it works again so it was not the Programmers fault.
But it would be nice when we get an Info next time

Please fix that bug, even reinstall doesnt help … it is such a good game …the issues starts with the new os form meta, maybe a screen issue cause the games seems to be darker.

A long time ago i installed and played this game. I was new to vr, it was new to vr, i have very few memories of it and cant say i got very far. I remember there being a few glitches and that may be why i didnt finish the game. (Which is my usual m.o. then i went and broke a controller. Welll helllo 3 years and a new controller later, ive got my headset updated, hooked to the bet and am redownloading the game as we speak. I remember paying about 40$ for this, so i do hope the glitches have been worked out. May the force be with you

I was really enjoying this game on the ps5 vr back awhile ago so I decided to get it for quest 3 and it's unplayable at the moment. The menu black out makes the game unplayable of course at this rate I don't know if it will ever get fixed which calls for a refund

The game play in itself is pretty fun and I really liked the characters but the fact that there are images from dlc on the main games page led to a huge disappointment when I found only one tale, and it's real short with only about 10 minutes of game play if you are any decent.
I tried to launch the game, but the entire main menu appeared black, so I cannot start it. I wanted to leave a proper review, but I was left with a bad impression even before I began.

reviews.review_title: Great... if you buy the DLC
reviews.review_description: The base game is great, but extremely short for the price point. Funny enough, the DLC overcompensates and you end up with MORE content than you'd expect for the price point (including the extra price from the DLC), so just buy both and you're good to go.

I cannot play the main game. I purchased base game and add-on same time, jumps to add on and cannot play Star Wars Tales. Had to boot device to even get past frozen screen then only Last Call will play.

I was able to play this game in the beginning, but now it does NOT load to play! Even though the game was decent and given, I just started to play this game, and honestly, if I can't play, then this game is not worth the cost!?? I would appreciate assistance to resolve this issue, and then I can update this review!

developer_response.body: Please reach out to our support team at https://support.starwars.com or support@starwars.com to see if we can help.

reviews.review_description: just got the game today was really hyped to play it and the menus are blacked out cant set the game up right or anything wish you guys would update to fix or at least acknowledge that there is a problem
This is a great game but the menu screen is blacked out so it makes to basically unplayable. It is a very good game but the devs just need to fix this glitch.
Hi, suddenly menus went completely black, any help?
All in game menus you use like to go to the wild and to the workshop are pitch black including the menu starting and all other ones journal included
Just got the game. All of the menus are just black, unreadable boxes. I’m unable to make settings or see how to start the game.
It is a wonderful game don't get me wrong, but the menu is black and I am just forced to click at random. I have been playing this for a long time now and this just has not been fixed yet.

This game is if not one of the best star wars games I have ever played. I’ve been playing this game since it came out and I have been wishing for a new update or part 2. If this game gets a part two it can go viral very fast
Was a cool game but there is a bug for the last few weeks that the menus are all backed out making it unplayable. Please no one waste you money on it till it’s fixed

All intro videos like Lucasfilm, Meta Oculus, etc, load then screen goes black, but still hear music. Nothing loads, start menu doesn't show. Tried rebooting, sleep mode, reinstalled, everything... Nothing works. What a waste of money i cant refund...

developer_response.body: Please reach out to our support team at https://support.starwars.com or support@starwars.com to see if we can help.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game, tons of fun, but today 6/10/26 when I opened the game, all of the menu screens are just black. Please fix!
The menu screens are blacked out.  Just started …. How can I fix it?
Took Em long enough.
Please fix the menu. I bought this game and loved it. But now I can't finish it
It's a amazing game but you cant even play with the menus being blacked out so it ruins the whole experience.
A big bug is present that makes all UI blacked out, rendering it nearly impossible to navigate menus. Please fix

Played fine yesterday, updated Quest today and game stops loading after intro. Black screen. Love the game but worthless now.  Tried all the recommended fixes except uninstall and install.  Hate to lose all my progress but it's useless now anyway. Noticed other players having same issue. A fix would be nice as it's to late for a refund.

developer_response.body: Please reach out to our support team at https://support.starwars.com or support@starwars.com to see if we can help.

reviews.review_title: The game is good but one weird thing...
reviews.review_description: At first it was awesome but now I can't play anything because the entire menu is black. Fix pwease

Unplayable, enough complaints about this written already, devs fix the bloody game ffs.
No way to see any in game menu,all blacked out. Cant be that difficult to fix. Come on!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

So much better than I expected.
Many weapons, tools, environments and it has a very strong atmosphere with sounds and music.
Awesome!
Fix the black menus!

reviews.review_title: Good game with out the glitch menu
reviews.review_description: Had the game for a while but recently the menu glitch and went black please fix it
Y'all, the Devs are aware of the blacked out menu, so stop leaving reviews about it
I recently bought the game. I went to play it today and I could t see anything. The picture was dark and you could see around yourself.

The saber levels suck so bad it’s embarrassing for ilm. Give us what we want.., fallen Jedi type with sabers not just blasters,, I know Vader immortal was done but build off that. Get your heads out your .,,”

The main story is decent but the add on is so much better. This is probably the best Star Wars game on vr
However I do wish some weapons had more shots per mag or whatever but it’s fine

so in this game you play as a joytech you're supposed to be able to customize your character but that's non existence but okay for some reason the bartender is frozen he won't move i have my dlc downloaded and he's just in the same loop over and over again and also you kinda need the bartender if you wanna do the bounty board which is a huge part and it's the stupid ghost glitch like if you throw a mug on him it goes straight through him it is supposed to be a hit box there but it's just rendering him it's not showing a hip box it's not telling any jokes or anything it's just he only speaks when you have like i don't know maybe some quests or that are meant to speak you know no jokes he's stuck in his cut scene mode where he's where he's completely background and it makes me really sad this is such a good game but they had to throw it all away because they moved on to a different games
All menus are blacked out
Want a refund unless this gets fixed immediately
This game worked when I first purchased but now it will load at all!! I would like my money refunded because I can no longer play a game that I paid for!￼

developer_response.body: Please reach out to our support team at https://support.starwars.com or support@starwars.com to see if we can help.

reviews.review_description:
I am 53 years old and was never much of a gamer beyond Mortal Kombat 2 in 1995. So this was a big roll of the dice for me. Modern gaming consoles tend to overwhelm me with the complex remotes. But I had to try this game because I am a first generation Star Wars fan, and I wanted to be in Star Wars! 😜
I gotta say, I was completely giddy with this game! I literally giggled a few times. So cool to look over and say, “Hey! That’s a thermal detonator!” and then pick it up and use it in combat. As an inexperienced gamer, I can’t speak to the quality of graphics or how it stacks up to other games. I do wish it was a little longer (I’m sure I missed some side quest opportunities ). I’d say I played it for four to six hours. I’d also like to say that this game was very user friendly for a rookie like me.  The controls were fairly intuitive, and it had a setting to help avoid motion sickness.  Plus, the action was pretty easy to keep up with. If you’re a Star Wars nerd, this game is a must!
When i open the game the game is glitched the camera is stuck in the corner so i have to look all the way up so it literally is impossible to play it.

I wish the game would be updated to where we wouldn't have to pay or anything like that it's just I wish the creators would update it to the point where we could choose our own path to go after the whole Droid missions and stuff we could choose what we want to do whether it was a Jedi a smuggler a bounty hunter or an imperial trooper but we forge our own destiny whether it was fighting along the resistance or fighting for the empire I wish it was updated to that to where we can go on adventures continuously and have fun

I love being in this world, it's so much fun to look around but the gameplay is super fun. It should be noted that this is NOT a lightsaber game except for one small mission. This is a blaster game and it is great. You should also get the expansion.

reviews.review_title: What a great game so much fun
reviews.review_description: If you’re a fan of Star Wars, you will love this game. It’s fun. It’s got great references. If you’re not a fan of Star Wars you will still enjoy this game. I recommend this for anybody. I hope they make another.

Well mostly great there is a few things i wish could've been in the game i have not 100% this game but i do wish that there was more story missions or more of seezelslak's stories and maybe if we saw him not behind the counter other than the dlc maybe if there was some bounty hunter missions i would give it a 5star other than that i love the gameplay and way everything works i love bacta going into my nose too:))))))
I can’t play anymore bc of the menu screen being all black. Dev pls fix this game plsssss

I wish there was more to it, and I’m hoping that one day there’ll be a nice update. I would love to be able to fly ships and go out of worlds with the ship and be able to fly it. You know to certain destinations in the same planet and more gun options in the ability to build your own lifesaver almost like a free roam game or you can make a whole Nother game and make it a free roam game where you can go to multiple destinations just like you know some of the games on Xbox and stuff that would be really awesome.

reviews.review_title: The best Star Wars VR game so far
reviews.review_description: Vader Immortal was cool, but it felt more like an interactive experience than a full-fledged game. Tales from the Galaxy's Edge, on the other hand, does feel like the full experience. There isn't too much depth to the characters or the story. But the VR makes you feel like you are in a galaxy far away.

I can’t read in the title screen. I understand where the basic buttons are, but I also can’t read when I pull up the three lines. I don’t know if how to get back to the main menu without leaving the game, but it is a very, very fun game though I’ll give it that ￼￼
When I try to play it, I can only see a little bit of the game in the bottom of my field of vision. How do I fix this? ￼
It's just a black menu screen when you just join the game and I had no idea what I was doing but I found out a way to get in the game and the menu inside the game is black too I am so mad

There’s a huge bug where all the menu boxes are black and you can’t see anything I just got this game and now I’ve un installed it twice and reinstalled twice and nothings happened everything online Ihave found won’t work either so it was a waste

reviews.review_title: This is a work of art.
reviews.review_description: This game was made so well the graphics are some of the best vr graphics for its time the story is so great and they made the game connect to the movies so well, I haven’t bought the DLC yet but as soon as I can I know I will be buying it this game is the best Star Wars game you will find on vr 200% worth the money. This game had very little issues and no bugs.

As an old codger in his sixties, I love this game. As mentioned by others, the controls are intuitive and easy to to get the hang of. Hardest level is challenging but I’ve actually managed to finish it, and now doing so again. Just need to find something similar that grips me. Need a sequel!

For some reason all the menu and journal screens are black and I can't see any buttons I bought the DLC as well and I can't play anything please do a bug fix and Im guessing it's only on quest 3s but I could be wrong
Overall when I was able to play the game it was amazing. But now I can’t even play it. I am on 3s and it won’t load and if it does I can’t interact with the main menu.

I really loved it, the addon are really good and it shows what can be done to get a good experince of SW in VR..  i really hope we get amother SW game of this caliber in the near future: a mandalorian bounty hunter game or a SW legacy game where you play a rogue during the time of the original trilogy... With the capability of the Quest 3, it would be awesome. On the con sode, the enemies were not as varied as it could have been but I understand that it was maybe because of the Quest 2 capability of the time... Please, we need a new SW game like this!
PLEASE
